# TQ Cleaners — llms.txt

> TQ Cleaners is a licensed, insured, 5-star rated residential and commercial cleaning company serving 30+ cities across San Antonio, Austin, Dallas, and Fort Worth, Texas. Founded and operated by Luis. Flat-rate transparent pricing, eco-friendly products, background-checked teams, 100% satisfaction guarantee.

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://tqcleaners.com/): Overview of services, service areas, reviews, and company trust signals.
- [About](https://tqcleaners.com/about/): Company story, founder Luis, values, and satisfaction guarantee.
- [Services](https://tqcleaners.com/services/): All 6 cleaning services overview.
- [Service Areas](https://tqcleaners.com/service-areas/): Interactive map of 30+ cities across 4 metros.
- [Reviews](https://tqcleaners.com/reviews/): Verified customer reviews from Texas families.
- [Blog](https://tqcleaners.com/blog/): Cleaning tips, move-out guides, Airbnb advice.
- [Contact](https://tqcleaners.com/contact/): Quote request form and direct contact info.

## Services

- [Standard House Cleaning](https://tqcleaners.com/services/standard-house-cleaning/): Recurring weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly maintenance cleaning.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://tqcleaners.com/services/deep-cleaning/): Full 50-point top-to-bottom reset including appliances, baseboards, and vents.
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://tqcleaners.com/services/move-in-move-out/): Deposit-back cleans for tenants, landlords, and property managers.
- [Short-Term Rental / Airbnb Cleaning](https://tqcleaners.com/services/short-term-rental-airbnb/): Hotel-quality turnovers with linen service and damage reports.
- [Office & Commercial Cleaning](https://tqcleaners.com/services/office-commercial/): Flexible after-hours cleaning with COI available within 24 hours.
- [Custom Cleaning Packages](https://tqcleaners.com/services/custom-packages/): Tailored plans for unique homes, estates, and businesses.

## Service Areas

- [San Antonio Metro](https://tqcleaners.com/service-areas/san-antonio-metro/): San Antonio, Alamo Heights, Helotes, Leon Valley, Converse, Universal City, Schertz, New Braunfels, Boerne, Stone Oak, The Dominion.
- [Austin Metro](https://tqcleaners.com/service-areas/austin-metro/): Austin, Round Rock, Pflugerville, Cedar Park, Kyle, Buda, Leander, Georgetown, Lakeway, Bee Cave, Dripping Springs.
- [Dallas Metro](https://tqcleaners.com/service-areas/dallas-metro/): Dallas, Plano, Frisco, Richardson.
- [Fort Worth Metro](https://tqcleaners.com/service-areas/fort-worth-metro/): Fort Worth, Arlington, Grapevine, Southlake.

- Service: Mobile — we come to you
